overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Vespucci Beach promenade at sunset. The character explores the beachfront, turns up a residential street, and returns to view the Del Perro Pier Ferris wheel in the distance before ending at a street corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with palm tree lining

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beachfront promenade passing pedestrians and benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade along the beach
ornate multi-story building with arched windows and decorative facade
white concrete benches facing the beach between the walkway and sand
tall street lamps along the beachfront illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along Vespucci Beach promenade at dusk, with palm trees lining the right side and ornate beachfront buildings on the left. The sky displays warm pink and purple sunset hues. Pedestrians stroll in both directions along the wide concrete pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill residential street with apartment buildings

events.description: turns left from beachfront promenade onto uphill street with tram tracks

agents.ego_description: turning left onto an uphill street away from the beach, walking past residential buildings

entered.detail: multi-story gray apartment complex with white balconies and external staircases
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto an uphill residential street, leaving the beachfront behind. The scene shifts to a narrower urban environment with apartment buildings on the right and the beachfront buildings now visible only in the distance on the left. Overhead power lines and street lamps line the inclined road.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with amusement pier view

events.description: turns right back toward the beachfront, returning to the promenade area
camera pans right to reveal the Del Perro Pier Ferris wheel illuminated against the sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the beachfront while looking toward the pier and Ferris wheel in the distance

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian in shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: palm trees reappearing along the right side of the path
large illuminated Ferris wheel on the pier visible against the colorful sunset sky
sandy beach area between the promenade and the ocean

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the beachfront promenade, with the camera panning to showcase the Del Perro Pier and its illuminated Ferris wheel against a vibrant purple and orange sunset. The beach sand is visible on the right, and the character continues walking past other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with shelters and benches

events.description: approaches a group of people gathered near green beach shelters

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past benches and approaching a group of people near beach shelters

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near the beach shelters

entered.detail: green canopy shelters with circular concrete bases providing shade
blue recycling bins and black trash cans along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a section of the promenade with patterned tile pavement, passing concrete benches and green beach shelters. A group of people gathers near the shelters on the right, and the beachfront buildings recede into the distance on the left.

events.description: turns left at street corner, leaving the beachfront for the urban street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner onto a street with a parked car visible

entered.detail: black sedan parked at the curb near the street corner
paved intersection with crosswalk markings and bollards

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at a street corner, transitioning from the beachfront promenade to an urban street setting. A black car is parked at the curb, and the view opens to show the street extending uphill with distant city buildings visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vibrant beachfront promenade through a residential neighborhood and back to the coast before ending on an urban street. It begins with a walk along the Vespucci Beach promenade under a pink and purple sunset, passing palm trees and ornate buildings while pedestrians stroll nearby. As the character turns left, the scene shifts to a narrower, uphill residential street lined with apartment buildings and overhead power lines, leaving the coast behind. The camera then returns to the promenade, panning to reveal the illuminated Ferris wheel of the Del Perro Pier against a vibrant orange sky before moving past patterned tiles, concrete benches, and green beach shelters. Finally, the movement concludes as the character turns left at a street corner, transitioning away from the sand toward an urban road with a parked black car and distant city buildings.
